title: Debut performance in Wexford's Fusion Cafe
heroAlt: Debut performance in Wexford's Fusion Cafe

heroImages.alt: Debut performance in Wexford's Fusion Cafe

bodyHtml:
Very much looking forward to our first ever Clang Sayne gig in Wexford next month at Fusion Cafe.

Support from the talented Johnny Fox. Many thanks to Sam Bezerra for our poster.
